# DDW Studio
 
> Proprietary AI SaaS product studio. We build and operate AI-powered software products for businesses globally.
 
## Products
- LYRA: AI receptionist for small businesses (lyrabyddw.com)
- FleetOS: AI fleet operations platform for trucking companies (fleetosbyddw.com)
- Sviluppiamo: Italian-language AI app builder for SMEs (sviluppiamo.dev)
 
## Contact
- Email: Brands@ddwstudio.com
